purpose_context: Today ~35 task-transition checks are hardcoded in specify_cli and assume spec-kitty's own repo shape, so in consumer repos they run inert and leak internal module names (#2534, #2330). This mission moves gate selection into the charter/doctrine layer: mission step contracts declare which gates fire on which transition, executable ASSET-kind helpers supply the gate logic behind a strict trust envelope, and charter activation selects the active gate set — fail-open throughout.
purpose_tldr: Make transition gate checks doctrine-declared and doctrine-supplied, so each repo runs only the gates its charter-active doctrine selects — no hardcoded, spec-kitty-shaped gates leaking into consumer repos.
